title: Liko's Tarantulas
description: A mod for large unique tarantulas! This mod adds plenty of new utility items, consumables, animals and structures for you to find!
body:
**Requires Geckolib & Patchouli!**
## G'day! Welcome to Liko's Tarantulas! A mod about, you guessed it, tarantulas. This mod is currently decently early in development, advice/ideas would be greatly appreciated! If there's a species of tarantula you'd like to see included let me know! 

This mod adds more enchantments, decorative blocks, utility items, combat items, healing items and more ways to farm and use string


I will add more arachnids besides tarantulas eventually, just starting basic.
 
Feel free to message me ideas or bug reports on Discord @Oerlikon
(or just join the Liko's Eternal Hell server.)

![Brazilian Black sheltering under a log](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vk6sqS9k/images/ba0a114de70c60173520c6e0252927b14d5bef22.png)

These huge spiders will rear up when hit by a player! Don't get too close or they'll bite!

![OBT threat posturing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91016c7d8d860d60d4976fdd961771f3e49c44f7.png)

They are typically very sneaky and hide away in burrows

![Cobalt blue hiding in it's burrow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94c30632ae47f9ec1122262d0d180f71e4efdb91.png)

You can also find ancient temples with treasure and unique talismans to aid you

![Ancient temple treasure room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8494e747c919a5eabb3fc4ad651a1402def4550.png)

**Current species:**
- Harpactira pulchripes (Golden blue legged baboon)
- Grammostola pulchra (Brazilian black)
- Brachypelma smithi (Mexican Redknee)
- Augacephalus breyeri
- Davus pantaloris (Guatemalan Tiger Rump)
- Aphonopelma chalcodes (Arizona Blonde)
- Cyriopagopus lividus (Cobalt blue)
- Poecilotheria metallica
- Monocentropus balfouri
- Brachypelma boehmei (Mexican fireleg)
- Ceratogyrus darlingi (Rear horned baboon)
- Typhochlaena seladonia (Brazilian jewel)
- Heteroscodra maculata (Togo starburst baboon)
- Pterinochilus murinus (OBT)
- Birupes simoroxigorum (Bornean neon blue leg)
- Theraphosa blondi (Goliath bird eater)
- Acanthoscurria geniculata (Brazilian white knee)
- Psalmopoeus irminia (Venezuelan suntiger)
- Ephebopus cyanognathus (Blue fang tarantula)
- Chilobrachys sp. "electric blue"
- Hapalopus formosus (Pumpkin Patch tarantula)

**VERSION 1.1.2**
